title: GitHub - vercel-labs/deepsec: Deepsec is a security harness for finding vulnerabilities in your codebase powered by coding agents
excerpt: Deepsec is a security harness for finding vulnerabilities in your codebase powered by coding agents - vercel-labs/deepsec
content_html:
deepsec an agent-powered vulnerability scanner that you can run in your own infrastructure, optimized to perform on-demand review of all code in existing large-scale repos.

deepsec is designed to surface hard-to-find issues that have been lurking in applications for a long time. It is configured to use the best models at maximum thinking levels (tunable via --thinking-level, see docs/models.md), meaning scans can cost thousands or even tens-of-thousands of dollars for large codebases. Our customers have found the cost worth it for how quickly they were able to patch vulnerabilities that would have otherwise gone unfixed.

For large codebases, work fans out across worker machines in parallel. If a run is interrupted or errors out partway through, just re-run the same command — deepsec picks up where it left off, skipping files it already analyzed and only investigating the rest.

Get started

Navigate to the root of the repository that you want to scan, then:

npx deepsec init       # creates .deepsec/ with this repo as the first project
cd .deepsec
pnpm install           # installs deepsec from npm

# Proceed as instructed by `init` output

Now have your coding agent bootstrap your installation. Open the agent of choice and prompt:

Read .deepsec/node_modules/deepsec/SKILL.md to understand the tool. Then read .deepsec/data/<id>/SETUP.md and follow it: skim this repo's README, any AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md, and a handful of representative code files, then replace each section of .deepsec/data/<id>/INFO.md.

Keep it SHORT — target 50–100 lines total. Pick 3–5 examples per section, not exhaustive enumeration. Name primitives (auth helpers, middleware) but no line numbers. Skip generic CWE categories — built-in matchers cover those. Cover only what's project-specific. INFO.md is injected into every scan batch; verbose context dilutes signal.

Then scan from inside .deepsec/:

pnpm deepsec scan
pnpm deepsec process    
pnpm deepsec revalidate # optional, cuts FP rate
pnpm deepsec export --format md-dir --out ./findings

If you feel like the deepsec should look at more parts of the code, give it the writing matchers doc to find more valuable starting points in your code base.

Docs

  • docs/getting-started.md — first-scan walkthrough
  • docs/reviewing-changes.md — process --diff for PR review and CI gating
  • docs/supported-tech.md — frameworks and ecosystems deepsec recognizes out of the box
  • docs/writing-matchers.md — prompt your coding agent to grow your matcher set
  • docs/configuration.md — deepsec.config.ts reference
  • docs/plugins.md — plugin authoring
  • docs/models.md — model selection, defaults, refusals, future models
  • docs/vercel-setup.md — AI Gateway + Vercel Sandbox keys / tokens
  • docs/architecture.md — pipeline internals
  • docs/data-layout.md — data/ schemas (FileRecord, RunMeta, …)
  • docs/faq.md — cost, model choice, sandbox mode, FP rate
  • samples/ — copy-paste starting points (currently: webapp/)
  • CONTRIBUTING.md — repo layout, dev workflow

AI provider

When running locally, deepsec falls back to your existing claude / codex subscription if you've logged in on this machine. Subscriptions (Claude Pro/Max, ChatGPT Plus) are useful for evaluating deepsec but generally don't have enough headroom for full repo scans.

For real scans, use Vercel AI Gateway. One key covers both Claude and Codex, and the gateway's default quotas are sized for highly concurrent research.

AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY=vck_...

See docs/vercel-setup.md for getting a key and for the Vercel Sandbox setup. To bypass the gateway, set ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN + ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL (or the OpenAI pair) explicitly. Explicit values always win over the AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY expansion.

If a process or revalidate run halts because the upstream credential ran out of quota or credits, deepsec stops gracefully and tells you where to top up. Re-run the same command afterward and it picks up where it left off.

Distributed execution (optional)

Large monorepos can fan work across Vercel Sandbox microVMs:

pnpm deepsec sandbox process --project-id my-app --sandboxes 10 --concurrency 4

Needs a Vercel account. The local working tree is tarballed and uploaded; .git is excluded. Both OIDC tokens (local) and access tokens (CI) are supported — see docs/vercel-setup.md.

Security model of deepsec itself

Treat deepsec like a coding agent with full shell access on the enviroment that it is running on. It is designed to run on trusted inputs (your source code) but you may still be concerned about prompt injection due to external dependencies or vendored code.

Running on a sandbox (see above) does limit the potential exposure substantially:

  • The API keys for the coding agents are injected outside of the sandbox and hence cannot be exfiltrated
  • For the worker sandboxes, network egress from the sandbox is limited to coding agent hosts (Egress is allowed during the bootstrap process, but this does not run the coding agent)

Workflow reference

Command What it does
scan Find candidate sites with regex matchers (fast, no AI)
process AI investigation; emits findings + recommendation
process --diff PR-mode: scan + investigate only files changed in a diff
triage Lightweight P0/P1/P2 classification (cheaper model)
revalidate Re-check existing findings; checks git history for fixes
enrich Add git committer info + (with a plugin) ownership data
report Markdown + JSON summary for one project
export Per-finding JSON or directory of markdown files
metrics Cross-project counts: severities, vulns by type, TPs
status Snapshot of the project mirror
sandbox <cmd> Run any of the above on Vercel Sandbox microVMs

License

Apache 2.0. See LICENSE and NOTICE.

sentences.zh: deepsec 是一种由代理驱动的漏洞扫描器，您可以在自己的基础设施中运行，并经过优化以对现有大型存储库中的所有代码执行按需审查。

blocks.html_en: deepsec is designed to surface hard-to-find issues that have been lurking in applications for a long time. It is configured to use the best models at maximum thinking levels (tunable via --thinking-level, see docs/models.md), meaning scans can cost thousands or even tens-of-thousands of dollars for large codebases. Our customers have found the cost worth it for how quickly they were able to patch vulnerabilities that would have otherwise gone unfixed.

sentences.en: deepsec is designed to surface hard-to-find issues that have been lurking in applications for a long time.
sentences.zh: deepsec 旨在发现长期潜伏在应用程序中的难以发现的问题。

sentences.en: It is configured to use the best models at maximum thinking levels (tunable via --thinking-level, see docs/models.md), meaning scans can cost thousands or even tens-of-thousands of dollars for large codebases.
sentences.zh: 它被配置为在最大思维水平上使用最佳模型（可通过 --thinking-level 进行调整，请参阅 docs/models.md），这意味着对于大型代码库来说，扫描可能会花费数千甚至数万美元。

sentences.en: Our customers have found the cost worth it for how quickly they were able to patch vulnerabilities that would have otherwise gone unfixed.
sentences.zh: 我们的客户发现，他们能够如此快速地修复原本无法修复的漏洞，因此所付出的成本是值得的。

blocks.html_en: For large codebases, work fans out across worker machines in parallel. If a run is interrupted or errors out partway through, just re-run the same command — deepsec picks up where it left off, skipping files it already analyzed and only investigating the rest.

sentences.en: If a run is interrupted or errors out partway through, just re-run the same command — deepsec picks up where it left off, skipping files it already analyzed and only investigating the rest.
sentences.zh: 如果运行被中断或中途出错，只需重新运行相同的命令 - deepsec 会从中断处继续，跳过已分析的文件，只调查其余文件。

sentences.zh: DeepSec本身的安全模型

blocks.html_en: Treat deepsec like a coding agent with full shell access on the enviroment that it is running on. It is designed to run on trusted inputs (your source code) but you may still be concerned about prompt injection due to external dependencies or vendored code.

sentences.en: Treat deepsec like a coding agent with full shell access on the enviroment that it is running on.
sentences.zh: 将 deepsec 像编码代理一样对待，在其运行的环境上具有完全的 shell 访问权限。

sentences.en: It is designed to run on trusted inputs (your source code) but you may still be concerned about prompt injection due to external dependencies or vendored code.
sentences.zh: 它被设计为在可信输入（您的源代码）上运行，但您可能仍然担心由于外部依赖项或供应商代码而导致的提示注入。

blocks.html_en: Running on a sandbox (see above) does limit the potential exposure substantially:

sentences.en: Running on a sandbox (see above) does limit the potential exposure substantially:
sentences.zh: 在沙箱上运行（见上文）确实大大限制了潜在的暴露：

blocks.html_en: • The API keys for the coding agents are injected outside of the sandbox and hence cannot be exfiltrated

sentences.en: The API keys for the coding agents are injected outside of the sandbox and hence cannot be exfiltrated
sentences.zh: 编码代理的 API 密钥被注入沙箱外部，因此无法被泄露

blocks.html_en: • For the worker sandboxes, network egress from the sandbox is limited to coding agent hosts (Egress is allowed during the bootstrap process, but this does not run the coding agent)

sentences.en: For the worker sandboxes, network egress from the sandbox is limited to coding agent hosts (Egress is allowed during the bootstrap process, but this does not run the coding agent)
sentences.zh: 对于工作沙箱，来自沙箱的网络出口仅限于编码代理主机（在引导过程中允许出口，但这不会运行编码代理）

content_html_zh:
deepsec 是一种由代理驱动的漏洞扫描器，您可以在自己的基础设施中运行，并经过优化以对现有大型存储库中的所有代码执行按需审查。

deepsec 旨在发现长期潜伏在应用程序中的难以发现的问题。 它被配置为在最大思维水平上使用最佳模型（可通过 --thinking-level 进行调整，请参阅 docs/models.md），这意味着对于大型代码库来说，扫描可能会花费数千甚至数万美元。 我们的客户发现，他们能够如此快速地修复原本无法修复的漏洞，因此所付出的成本是值得的。

对于大型代码库，工作在工作机器上并行地展开。 如果运行被中断或中途出错，只需重新运行相同的命令 - deepsec 会从中断处继续，跳过已分析的文件，只调查其余文件。

开始使用

导航到要扫描的存储库的根目录，然后：

npx deepsec init       # creates .deepsec/ with this repo as the first project
cd .deepsec
pnpm install           # installs deepsec from npm

# Proceed as instructed by `init` output

现在让您的编码代理引导您的安装。 打开选择的代理并提示：

阅读 .deepsec/node_modules/deepsec/SKILL.md 以了解该工具。 然后阅读 .deepsec/data/<id>/SETUP.md 并遵循它：浏览此存储库的 README、任何 AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md 和一些代表性代码文件，然后替换 .deepsec/data/<id>/INFO.md 的每个部分。 保持简短——目标总共 50-100 行。 每个部分选取 3-5 个示例，而不是详尽列举。 命名原语（身份验证助手、中间件），但没有行号。 跳过通用 CWE 类别 - 内置匹配器涵盖了这些类别。 仅涵盖特定于项目的内容。 INFO.md 被注入到每个扫描批次中；冗长的上下文会削弱信号。

然后从 .deepsec/ 内部扫描：

pnpm deepsec scan
pnpm deepsec process    
pnpm deepsec revalidate # optional, cuts FP rate
pnpm deepsec export --format md-dir --out ./findings

如果您觉得 DeepSec 应该查看代码的更多部分，请为其提供编写匹配器文档，以在您的代码库中找到更有价值的起点。

Docs

  • docs/getting-started.md — 首次扫描演练
  • docs/reviewing-changes.md — PR 审查和 CI 门控的 process --diff
  • docs/supported-tech.md — deepsec 开箱即用的框架和生态系统
  • docs/writing-matchers.md — 提示您的编码代理增加您的匹配器集
  • docs/configuration.md — deepsec.config.ts 参考
  • docs/plugins.md — 插件创作
  • docs/models.md — 模型选择、默认、拒绝、未来模型
  • docs/vercel-setup.md — AI 网关 + Vercel 沙盒密钥/令牌
  • docs/architecture.md — 管道内部结构
  • docs/data-layout.md — 数据/模式（FileRecord、RunMeta、...）
  • docs/faq.md — 成本、模型选择、沙箱模式、FP 率
  • Samples/ — 复制粘贴起点（当前：webapp/）
  • CONTRIBUTING.md — 存储库布局、开发工作流程

人工智能提供商

在本地运行时，如果您已登录本机，则 deepsec 会回退到您现有的 claude / codex 订阅。 订阅（Claude Pro/Max、ChatGPT Plus）对于评估 deepsec 很有用，但通常没有足够的空间来进行完整的回购扫描。

对于真实扫描，请使用 Vercel AI Gateway。 一把钥匙涵盖了 Claude 和 Codex，网关的默认配额大小适合高度并发的研究。

AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY=vck_...

请参阅 docs/vercel-setup.md 以获取密钥和 Vercel 沙箱设置。 要绕过网关，请显式设置 ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN + ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL（或 OpenAI 对）。 显式值始终胜过 AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY 扩展。

如果由于上游凭证用完配额或积分而导致进程或重新验证运行停止，deepsec 会正常停止并告诉您在哪里充值。 之后重新运行相同的命令，它会从上次中断的地方继续执行。

分布式执行（可选）

大型 monorepos 可以跨 Vercel Sandbox microVM 进行工作：

pnpm deepsec sandbox process --project-id my-app --sandboxes 10 --concurrency 4

需要 Vercel 帐户。 本地工作树已压缩并上传； .git 被排除在外。 支持 OIDC 令牌（本地）和访问令牌 (CI) — 请参阅 docs/vercel-setup.md。

DeepSec本身的安全模型

将 deepsec 像编码代理一样对待，在其运行的环境上具有完全的 shell 访问权限。 它被设计为在可信输入（您的源代码）上运行，但您可能仍然担心由于外部依赖项或供应商代码而导致的提示注入。

在沙箱上运行（见上文）确实大大限制了潜在的暴露：

  • 编码代理的 API 密钥被注入沙箱外部，因此无法被泄露
  • 对于工作沙箱，来自沙箱的网络出口仅限于编码代理主机（在引导过程中允许出口，但这不会运行编码代理）

工作流程参考

命令 它的作用
scan 使用正则表达式匹配器查找候选站点（快速，无人工智能）
过程 人工智能调查；发布发现+建议
过程--差异 PR 模式：仅扫描+调查差异中更改的文件
分类 轻量级P0/P1/P2分类（较便宜型号）
重新验证 重新检查现有发现；检查 git 历史记录以查找修复
丰富 添加 git 提交者信息 + （使用插件）所有权数据
报告 一个项目的 Markdown + JSON 总结
出口 每个查找的 JSON 或 Markdown 文件的目录
指标 跨项目计数：严重性、按类型划分的漏洞、TP
地位 项目镜像的快照
沙箱 <cmd> 在 Vercel Sandbox microVM 上运行上述任意操作

执照

阿帕奇2.0。 请参阅许可和通知。
